LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsDesc: Select which main buttons stay on the bottom bar.
LanguageData.DMMB.AdvancedEditModeDesc: In this mode, you can resize buttons and add dropdown menus to each button.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsFixedWidthCenter: Center fixed-width buttons when there is extra space
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsPinMenuRight: Pin vanilla menu button to the right
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsPinMainButtonsMenuWindowRig: Open main buttons menu on the far right
Windows opened from this menu will also open on the far right.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsPlaySettingsHoverToggle: Reveal play settings on hover (hides the menu button)
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsPlaySettingsHoverToggleDesc: Shows play settings only while your mouse is over the bottom-right UI widgets (date, time, speed, etc.).
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsHidePlaySettingsEditModeBut: Only applies when searchable play settings menu is disabled.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsDefaultNewButtonsHiddenDesc: When enabled, newly added main buttons (from new or updated mods) are automatically hidden from the bottom bar.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsWidgetTimeDesc: Shows the vanilla in-game date and time readout as a bar widget.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsWidgetTimeIrlDesc: Shows your real local clock time in the bar.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsWidgetTimeSpeedDesc: Shows pause/speed controls in the bar.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsWidgetWeatherDesc: Shows current map weather and outdoor temperature in the bar.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsWidgetFpsTpsDesc: Shows current FPS and TPS in the bar.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsWidgetBatteryDesc: Shows laptop battery charge and charging status.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsWidgetDisableVanillaDateRea: Hides RimWorld's default date/time UI on the right side so only widget-based date/time is shown.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsWidgetDisableVanillaTimeCon: Hides RimWorld's default pause/speed controls so only widget-based controls are shown.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsWidgetDisableVanillaWeather: Hides RimWorld's default weather readout on the right side so only widget-based weather is shown.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsWidgetDisableVanillaConditi: Hides the game condition readout list on the right side.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsWidgetRevealVanillaResource: Reveal vanilla resource readout on hover
Shows the resource list only while the mouse is within the resource readout width on the left side of the screen.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsWidgetDisableVanillaResourc: Hides the resource list on the left side.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsWidgetDisableVanillaMouseov: Hides the mouseover readout text near the bottom-left.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsWidgetDisableVanillaTempera: Hides the vanilla outdoors/indoors temperature text by returning an empty string.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsHideAllGizmoLabelsDesc: Hides gizmo label text, extra label text, and cooldown text. Gizmos with missing/bad icons, such as dev gizmos, are excluded.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsHideGizmoLabelsForSelectedC: Hide gizmo labels for selected colonists only
Hides label text, extra label text, and cooldown text only when every selected object is a colonist. Gizmos with missing/bad icons, such as dev gizmos, are excluded.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsExperimentalAtlasOptimizati: Experimental Optimization: cache main button atlas drawing. Improves render performance of the bottom bar buttons.
Only applies while this mod draws the main button bar. Caches stitched atlas textures to reduce repeated per-slice draw calls.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsGizmoScaleMapOnlyDesc: These controls only scale map gizmos which are rendered when you select either a colonist/building on the map.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsForceShowDesc: Select buttons that should stay available even when their normal visibility worker would hide them. Buttons hidden from the bar are still hidden.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsMenuBlacklistDesc: Select which main buttons appear in the menu list.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsMenuBlacklistUseHidden: Show only disabled buttons in the menu
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsAdvancedDesc: These settings control whether specific Harmony patch groups are applied at startup. Changing them requires a game restart. Disabling patch groups you are not using can provide a tiny performance improvement.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsEnableCommandGizmoSizePatch: Controls patches that adjust command gizmo width and height for the gizmo scale and spacing settings. Requires restart.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsEnableGizmoLabelVisibilityP: Controls patches that hide command gizmo labels, extra labels, and ability cooldown text. Requires restart.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsEnableSelectorSelectionStat: Controls Selector patches that cache whether all selected map objects are colonists for the selected-colonists-only gizmo label setting. Requires restart.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsEnableVanillaWidgetPatchesD: Controls patches that hide or reveal vanilla date, time controls, weather, conditions, resource readout, mouseover readout, and temperature UI. Requires restart.
LanguageData.DMMB.SettingsEnableAtlasOptimizationPatc: Controls the Widgets.DrawAtlas hook used by the experimental main button atlas optimization. Requires restart.
LanguageData.DMMB.PlaySettingsEditDropdowns: Edit main buttons (move, resize, and set dropdowns)
LanguageData.DMMB.WidgetWeatherTooltip: Current map weather and outdoor temperature
LanguageData.DMMB.DropdownEditorDesc: Select which buttons should appear when you hover a main button.
